description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 44 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 16 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment to carry a 15.4" laptop and an elasticated openingOne earphones gate on the topOne zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches and a key holderOne pocket on the front with an asymmetric openingOne mesh pocket on the left side and a zipped pocket on the right side for enhanced spacePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort CareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
